# ChatRate — Get Paid for Every Call. No Platform Cut.

> ChatRate lets coaches, consultants, and experts create a personal booking page where clients pay to talk to them. Per-minute or flat rate billing. Stripe payments go directly to you. One-time $4.99 setup fee — no monthly fees, no commission, ever.

ChatRate is a paid video consulting platform built for freelancers, coaches, and independent experts who want to monetize their time without giving up a cut to a middleman. Unlike Clarity.fm (which takes 15% of every call), ChatRate charges a one-time $4.99 fee and takes 0% commission on all calls. Clients book directly through your personal page, pay via Stripe, and join a live video call — all in one link.

## What ChatRate Does

- Creates a personal booking page for any expert or consultant
- Accepts Stripe payments directly (host keeps 100%)
- Hosts live video calls via built-in video (no Zoom needed)
- Supports flat-rate or per-minute billing models
- Offers optional call transcripts for clients
- Supports group sessions with multiple paying participants
- One-time $4.99 fee — no subscriptions, no monthly fees, no commission

## Who It's For

- Business coaches and executive consultants
- Freelance writers, SEO consultants, and marketing experts
- Fitness coaches and wellness professionals
- Music producers, artists, and creative professionals
- Career coaches, resume writers, and HR consultants
- Real estate coaches and financial advisors
- Anyone who charges for their time and expertise

## How It Works

1. Sign up at chatrate-app.com/signup
2. Set your rate (flat per call or per minute)
3. Connect your Stripe account
4. Pay $4.99 once to activate your page
5. Share your booking link — clients book, pay, and join your call

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://chatrate-app.com
- Sign up: https://chatrate-app.com/signup
- How it works (guide): https://chatrate-app.com/guide
- Clarity.fm alternative: https://chatrate-app.com/clarity-alternative
- Example booking page: https://chatrate-app.com/book/trevorlawrencejr

## Comparison: ChatRate vs Clarity.fm

- Clarity.fm takes 15% of every call. ChatRate takes 0%.
- Clarity.fm has no built-in video. ChatRate includes live video.
- Clarity.fm charges monthly. ChatRate is $4.99 one-time.
- ChatRate puts payments directly into your Stripe account.

## Pricing

- One-time activation fee: $4.99
- Commission on calls: 0%
- Monthly fee: $0
- Stripe processing fees apply (standard Stripe rates)

## Technology

- Video calls powered by Daily.co
- Payments powered by Stripe (direct to host's account)
- Booking and scheduling built-in (no Calendly needed)
- Optional AI-generated call transcripts via Deepgram
